name: CopperCorp Resources Inc.
description: CopperCorp Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the exploration and development of world-class copper-gold projects in western Tasmania, Australia. The company's flagship projects include the Alpine Copper-Gold Project and the AMC Project, which are situated in a highly prospective and mining-friendly jurisdiction with excellent infrastructure. CopperCorp aims to create shareholder value through systematic exploration and discovery of critical metals necessary for the global transition to clean energy.
